title: Improper Input Validation during User Account Creation in Splunk Enterprise
description: Improper Input Validation during User Account Creation in Splunk Enterprise
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.2.2, 10.0.5, 9.4.10, 9.3.11, or higher.
Splunk is actively monitoring and patching Splunk Cloud Platform instances.
